title: Domix's Pink Cobblemon
description: Resource pack that makes pokemon from cobblemon mod pink.
body:
## **Domix's Pink Cobblemon**
Resource pack that makes pokemon in the awesome [**Cobblemon Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) pink. **_Doesn't add pink shinies (yet)_**
##### ***Please remeber this resource pack is a heavy WIP. More Pink pokemon coming soon***
- Also check out my other [**Resource Pack**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/domixs-cobblemon-gui) :)

---

**Requirements:**
- [**Cobblemon Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

<details>
